name: Prefabricated Portable Cabin
description:
Prefabricated Portable Cabin — Factory-Built, Quality-Checked, Ready to Deliver

A prefabricated portable cabin arrives at your site already finished. Walls fitted. Floor laid. Electrics in. No site workers needed on your end. What is built in our factory in Bangalore is exactly what gets delivered to you — in 7 to 14 working days.

What "Prefabricated" Actually Means for a Portable Cabin

Most portable cabins are site-assembled. The frame and panels arrive separately. Your team — or a local contractor — puts it together on your premises. The finish quality depends on who is assembling it and what conditions they work in that day.

A prefabricated portable cabin is different. The entire unit — frame, panels, ceiling, floor, door, windows, and electrics — is built inside our factory before it reaches you. You do not receive parts. You receive a finished cabin. One unit. Ready to use within hours of delivery.

A prefabricated portable cabin as delivered — MS frame, corrugated steel panels, door and window factory-fitted. No on-site construction required.

The Factory Build Process — Frame to Finished Unit

Here is what happens between your order and delivery.

Frame fabrication. The MS steel base frame and corner columns are cut and welded to your specified dimensions. Every weld is inspected before the next stage begins.

Panel attachment. 40mm insulated sandwich panels are fixed to the frame — walls and roof. Machine-pressed panels produce tight, consistent joints. No on-site cutting.

Interior fit-out. Pre-laminated ceiling boards, vinyl flooring, aluminium-framed windows, and the entry door are installed inside the factory. Electrical conduit, wiring, switches, and light fittings are completed at this stage — not on your site.

Pre-dispatch check. The finished unit is inspected in full before it is loaded onto the delivery vehicle.

Inside a prefabricated portable cabin after factory fit-out — pre-laminated ceiling board, LED lighting, vinyl flooring, AC point, and aluminium windows all installed before dispatch.

What SAMAN Checks Before Your Cabin Leaves the Factory

Every prefabricated portable cabin goes through a 5-point check before dispatch:

  1. Frame alignment — base frame and corner columns checked for level and squareness
  2. Panel seals — all wall-to-frame and roof-to-wall joints checked for gaps
  3. Electrical test — wiring, switches, and fittings tested with a live supply inside the factory
  4. Door and window function — each shutter opened, closed, and locked 3 times; handles and locks confirmed
  5. Exterior finish — paint coat checked for full coverage; no bare steel or rust spots permitted at dispatch

If anything fails the check, it is fixed before the unit is loaded. You do not manage factory problems on your site. We manage them in ours.

Factory-finished interior of a prefabricated portable cabin — pre-laminated wall panels, vinyl flooring, aluminium door and window function-tested before dispatch as part of the 5-point quality check.

Factory-Built vs Site-Assembled — What Changes for the Buyer

Factory-built Site-assembled
Consistency Every unit identical — same dimensions, same finish Varies by assembly crew and site conditions
Timeline Delivered fully finished in 7–14 days Parts delivered; on-site assembly adds 1–3 days
Finish quality Controlled factory environment, no weather impact Open to weather, dust, and variation in workmanship

A factory-built unit is ready to use the day it arrives. A site-assembled unit is ready only after your team finishes the fit-out on your premises.

If you have confirmed your size and are ready to move forward, see how to buy a portable cabin from SAMAN — stock availability, delivery areas, and lead times are all on that page.

Prefabricated Portable Cabin — Sizes, Specs, and Starting Price

Standard sizes available as factory-built complete units:

  • 8 × 10 ft — fits 2 people comfortably; starting at ₹2,10,000
  • 10 × 12 ft — fits 3–4 people; starting at ₹2,45,000
  • 12 × 20 ft — fits 6–8 people; price on request

The 30×10 ft prefabricated portable cabin — factory-built complete unit with 4 aluminium-framed windows, sliding entry door, and insulated corrugated steel panels, delivered on a concrete plinth.

Every unit includes: MS steel frame, 40mm insulated panels, pre-laminated ceiling board, vinyl flooring, 2 aluminium-framed windows, 1 entry door, and standard electrical fittings. Custom sizes are available with a 12–16 working day lead time.

Explore the full range of types and uses on our portable cabin page. If your requirement has grown beyond a single unit, our modular portable cabin page covers expandable configurations.

FAQs Prefabricated Portable Cabin

Q: What is checked in the factory before a prefabricated portable cabin is dispatched?

Every unit goes through a 5-point pre-dispatch check covering frame alignment, panel seals, a live electrical test, door and window function, and exterior paint finish. Any unit that fails a check is reworked before loading — defects are not sent to site for repair.

Q: How long does it take to manufacture and deliver a prefabricated portable cabin?

Standard sizes take 7 to 10 working days to manufacture and deliver within South India. Custom dimensions or specifications take 10 to 14 working days. If your timeline is under 7 days, call us — in some cases, a completed unit from finished stock is available for immediate dispatch.

Q: Is a factory-built portable cabin more expensive than a site-assembled one?

A prefabricated portable cabin typically costs 8–12% more than a site-assembled unit of the same size. That difference covers the factory fit-out, 5-point QC inspection, and delivery as a complete ready-to-use unit. Most buyers recover it within the first month — no on-site assembly labour to arrange, no rework visits, and no waiting for site conditions to cooperate.

Tell us your size, location, and when you need delivery. We will send you a price and production schedule within 2 hours.

📞 Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937 📍 Manufacturing: Bangalore · Dispatch: Pan India · Delivery: 7–14 working days
short_description:
🏭 30×10×8.6 ft — factory-built, 5-point QC · Office · Shop · Site · Residential · Arrives complete. No site assembly.

Prefabricated portable cabin — 30×10×8.6 ft, factory-built MS frame structure, quality-checked across 5 points before dispatch. Built for buyers who need a complete, finished unit delivered to site — no on-site assembly, no rework. Factory-fabricated in Bangalore. Delivered complete.

Size
30×10×8.6 ft
Capacity
6–8 people
Frame
MS steel, factory-welded
Panel
40mm insulated sandwich
Starting Price
Rs 2,10,000
Delivery
7–14 working days
Floor Load
150 kg/m²
Relocations
6–8 crane-lift cycles
📍 Factory: Bangalore · South India + Greater Noida
📞 +91 97089 89937
